channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Everything new on Disney+ in April 2025: Andor season 2, Doctor Who season 15, Dying for Sex, and more
item.description: From the return of hugely popular shows to new movies, here's what you'll want to watch on Disney+ in April.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI startup just bought X for $45 billion
item.description: Elon Musk said on Friday that his xAI has acquired X, the social media app formerly known as Twitter, in an all-stock transaction for $45 billion, including $12 billion in debt. “xAI and X’s futures are intertwined.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: ECMAScript 2025 JavaScript standard takes shape
item.description: ECMAScript 2025, the next version of an ECMA International standard for JavaScript, will standardize new JavaScript capabilities ranging from JSON modules to import attributes, new Set methods, sync iterator helpers, and regular expression modifiers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Group chats rule the world
item.description: How many group chats are you involved in? For me, it varies. Right now, there are only two — and both are of a more private nature.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Airman Who Exploited a 9-Year-Old: A Shocking Case of Child Coercion
item.description: US airman David Ibarra charged with coercing 9-year-old to share explicit images on TikTok and Roblox. He posed as 13-year-old, paid her $191, and admitted under interrogation to coercing other girls.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: ChatGPT may be making us lonelier
item.description: A new pair of studies from MIT Media Lab and OpenAI found that those who use the chatbot most heavily also experience the most loneliness. The catch-22: it’s unclear whether this is caused by the chatbot itself or if lonely individuals are simply more likely to seek out emotional bonds.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Reddit’s 50% plunge fails to entice dip buyers as growth slows
item.description: The gloomy sentiment around Reddit Inc. has failed to dissipate after its shares fell 50% from a February high, with volatile technology stocks under pressure.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: A future Apple Watch could debut a glass frame with touch controls
item.description: A new leak and patent indicate that Apple is working on a future Apple Watch with a touchscreen glass frame.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: Dating is even more partisan in the Trump era
item.description: Donald Trump’s return to office has bolstered a wave of apps. Bluesky spiked in November; Signal is seeing renewed attention. Niche dating apps are also raking in new users—both from the right and left. Americans are dating across party lines less and less.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Xiaomi's Google TV Streamer rival gets a new processor and a much-needed storage leap
item.description: The 3rd-gen Xiaomi TV Box S is now official, though we're still waiting on price and availability details.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Convicted of bilking investors, Nikola founder and Trump donor gets a presidential pardon
item.description: The founder of an electric car start-up sentenced to prison for exaggerating the potential of his technology has been pardoned by President Donald Trump, potentially wiping out hundreds of millions of dollars in restitution that prosecutors were seeking for bamboozled investors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Marvel sleuths think they've solved the case about Avengers: Doomsday's story, and it's all down to a single chair's shadow
item.description: Avengers 5's cast reveal livestream has spawned two new big Marvel fan theories about its plot and a popular character's return.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Layoffs erase more than 600 Bay Area tech, biotech, hotel, retail jobs
item.description: A fresh wave of layoffs jolted the Bay Area during March with several rounds of cutbacks that erased well over 600 jobs.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Nueve tendencias de CRM para 2025: la IA redefine la ecuación del cliente
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) tiene el potencial de transformar todos los aspectos de una empresa, pero sobre todo la gestión de las relaciones con los clientes (CRM), las funciones comerciales de cara al exterior de ventas, marketing y servicio al cliente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New Australia CIO appointments
item.description: Congratulations to these ‘movers and shakers’ recently hired or promoted into a new chief information officer, senior IT, or board role in Australia. February and March 2025 appointments John Granger joins Healthscope Healthscope has appointed John Granger as Chief Information Officer.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Apple Watch vs. Google & Fitbit
item.description: Both the Apple and Pixel watches along with most Fitbit devices can track numerous exercises and are capable of automatically detecting the exercise you’re doing and offer to track them for you.
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien And Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: AMD gets another downgrade on tough competition with Nvidia
item.description: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. is falling further behind Nvidia Corp. in its technological capabilities, a fact that could continue to pressure the stock, according to Jefferies, which downgraded the chipmaker to hold.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Agencies prepare to be resilient through ‘multidimensional’ risks and threats
item.description: From cyber attacks to natural disasters, agency continuity planning has become more “multidimensional” than ever before. The post Agencies prepare to be resilient through ‘multidimensional’ risks and threats first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated
item.description: Integrating electronic health records, remote sensing, and artificial intelligence brings efficiency for both patients and providers. The post Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Preserve loved ones' voicemails on iPhone
item.description: Saving the voices of loved ones can be a comforting way to keep alive memories. Kurt "the CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to preserve voicemail messages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft lauds Hyperlight Wasm for WebAssembly workloads
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Hyperlight Wasm, a virtual machine “micro-guest” that can run WebAssembly component workloads written in a multitude of languages including C and Python. Introduced March 26, Hyperlight Wasm serves as a Rust library crate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Red Hat’s AI portfolio evolves to address enterprise deployment challenges
item.description: Red Hat announced updates to Red Hat OpenShift AI and Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI), with a goal of addressing the high costs and technical complexity of scaling AI beyond pilot projects into full deployment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Federal News Network’s CX Exchange 2025
item.description: End-to-End Experience – The evolution of federal service delivery The post Federal News Network’s CX Exchange 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ethernet roadmap: AI drives high-speed, efficient Ethernet networks
item.description: At next month’s Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC), many of the technologies that are driving current and future Ethernet development will be on full display by the Ethernet Alliance, which is set to unveil its tenth anniversary Ethernet roadmap.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Protecting your daughter from deepfakes and online abuse
item.description: Artificial intelligence-generated images and videos that use someone’s likeness typically target women without their consent. The CyberGuy unpacks how to protect loved ones.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
